song_name: Another Brick In The Wall Part 2

content:
Play Dm as barre chord x57765

[Intro]
[ch]Dm[/ch]

[Verse]

We don't need no education[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
No dark sarcasm in the classroom[/tab]

Teacher, leave them kids alone...[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
Hey! Teacher, leave them kids alone...[/tab]
